channel.title: Latest alerts from India Meteorological Department
channel.description: Latest alerts from India Meteorological Department

image.title: Latest alerts from India Meteorological Department

item.title: Heavy to very heavy with extremely heavy rainfall
item.description: Heay to very rainfall at few places with isolated Extremely Heavy Rainfall very likely over Jammu-Kashmir-Ladakh-Gilgit-Baltistan-Muzaffarabad, Himachal Pradesh and Gujarat Region.
item.author: rainfallnwfc@gmail.com (NWFC DIVISION, IMD, NEW DELHI)

item.title: Heavy to very heavy with extremely heavy rainfall
item.description: Heay to very rainfall at few places with isolated Extremely Heavy Rainfall very likely over Uttarakhand and West Uttar Pradesh.
item.author: rainfallnwfc@gmail.com (NWFC DIVISION, IMD, NEW DELHI)

item.title: Heavy to very heavy with extremely heavy rainfall
item.description: Heay to very rainfall at few places with isolated Extremely Heavy Rainfall very likely over Sub-himalayan west Bengal, Sikkim, Assam, and Meghalaya.
item.author: rainfallnwfc@gmail.com (NWFC DIVISION, IMD, NEW DELHI)

item.title: Heavy to very heavy with extremely heavy rainfalls
item.description: Heay to very rainfall at few places with isolated Extremely Heavy Rainfall very likely over Konkan, Madhya Maharashtra, West Madhya Pradesh.
item.author: rainfallnwfc@gmail.com (NWFC DIVISION, IMD, NEW DELHI)
